Discount Rules

Rule Name Vendors Expense Type Value Properties Actions

No Discount Rules Found

Click the "Create New Rule" button to get started.

New Discount Rule

Follow the steps to create a new discount rule.

1

Details

Rule name, vendors, expenses & value.

2

Properties

Apply to properties.

3

Review

Confirm and save.

Rule name is required.

At least one vendor must be selected.

At least one expense must be selected.

%

Percentage value is required.

$

Amount is required.

Apply to Properties

Select the properties this rule should apply to. If none are selected, the rule will apply to all properties.
